critic_raw:
Issue 1: Transaction feed mismatch — baseline from settlement batch, challenger from authorization stream.
Issue 2: Label maturation mismatch — baseline includes pending disputes, challenger uses 60-day settled-only.
Issue 3: Q4 threshold tuned on Q4 and reported on Q4 — threshold self-selection.
Issue 4: Model and pipeline changed simultaneously — gains not attributable to model alone.
defender_raw: The label maturation rule is a quality improvement; the authorization feed is production-realistic. However, the comparison must be apples-to-apples. Concede Issues 3 and 4 entirely. Issues 1 and 2 require harmonization — not abandonment of the new practices, but application of the same rules to both systems.
adjudication_raw:
Round 1: Defender concedes Issues 3 and 4, argues Issues 1 and 2 reflect quality improvements but concedes they must be harmonized.

Round 2: Issues 1 and 2 resolved as requiring rescoring on shared feed and label definition.

Final verdict: critique_wins.
